title: Markdown view mode (mermaid.js, node mention chips)
body: In view mode, markdown files should render properly with full markdown support. Currently missing: mermaid.js diagrams should render as actual diagrams (not raw code blocks); custom chips for node mentions (the same chips rendered in agent chat) should work in file view mode; general markdown elements (tables, syntax-highlighted code, images) should render correctly. Edit mode can stay raw text; view mode should be a fully rendered preview.
